hyperedges.label: Plant seed data pipeline: JSON files → validator → DB seed
Climate analysis chain: zone lookup + GDD + frost window → site panel
Habitat Value Score components: natives + keystones + host plants + fauna
Polyculture placement pipeline: resolve spacing → hex-pack → assign species → optimise layout → emit to map
Site auto-fill pipeline: SiteFetchWorker dispatches all property_data fetchers in parallel and streams results to SitePanel
PlanningPanel estimators share placed_plants + structures data to produce effort / water / forage outputs
DB Seed Pipeline: init_db → _seed_uses_lookup + _seed_from_json_file + _seed_fauna + seed_example_polycultures
Schema Version + Reseed: _SCHEMA_VERSION controls wipe-and-reseed of dependent tables on upgrade
plant_uses Junction (v13): uses lookup table + plant_uses junction replace permaculture_uses blob
Habitat Quality Scoring Features
Content Governance Rules (vocab, indigenous, pioneer)
Build & Distribution Pipeline

nodes.label: Schema Versioning Convention
nodes.rationale: _SCHEMA_VERSION bump triggers one-time reseed on user's next launch. Without it, existing installs won't pick up new tables or rows. Reseed wipes dependent tables listed in the needs_reseed block.

nodes.label: Habitat Value Score
nodes.rationale: Composite 0-100 score with breakdown of % natives, keystone species, host plants, vegetation-layer diversity, structural diversity, bloom continuity. Tallamy-style live readout. Gives user a single ecological-quality dial to optimize against.

nodes.label: Bloom & Berry Calendar
nodes.rationale: Replaces Harvest Calendar. Reframed for habitat continuity (nectar gap detection) instead of human harvest scheduling.

nodes.label: Establishment Effort Estimator
nodes.rationale: Splits Year 1 establishment hours from Year 3+ stewardship hours to communicate the front-load now, hands-off later reality of native plantings.

nodes.label: plants_master.json Enrichment
nodes.source_location: Data work that unlocks the above

nodes.label: No Indigenous-Knowledge Claims Rule
nodes.rationale: V1.37 removed 133 Indigenous-knowledge references. Named-community attributions, sacred/ceremonial/smudging framings, appropriative folk names are banned. Generic ethnobotany verbs without named-community attribution are acceptable.

nodes.label: Vocabulary Refresh (no permaculture tags)
nodes.rationale: Reframe toward native habitat and functional landscape design. Banned tag keys: biomass, pest_deterrent, food_forest, edible_landscape. Keep ecological function and landscape design tags.

nodes.label: Pioneer → Early Successional Reframe
nodes.rationale: User explicitly rejected pioneer/colonizer framing. Use early_successional instead. Reverted in V1.37 round 3 — flag if it creeps back.
